prompt_en: A witness ferry departing through harbor smoke with survivors guarding taped evidence packets, wet queue cards flapping, and a small vessel carrying testimony instead of cargo. checkpoint pursuit, diesel smoke, official line versus detour line, compressing corridors. small ferry, taped witness packets, wet queue cards, survivors shielding documents from spray. Grounded Korean apocalypse cinematic realism.
prompt_ko_context: 많은 사람 대신 증언을 실은 작은 배가 출항하는 엔딩. 보호된 증언과 희생의 무게가 중요하다.
camera_notes: Stay low to the deck. Let the testimony packets and anxious faces dominate before revealing the harbor behind them.
audio_notes: Hull creaks, wind across plastic tarps, radio fragments, restrained strings.
stitch_prompt: A witness ferry departing through harbor smoke with survivors guarding taped evidence packets, wet queue cards flapping, and a small vessel carrying testimony instead of cargo. Match style pack P2.ending.p2_end_witness_ferry.
